title: Cost-volume-profit analysis
summary: 9706 — break-even, margin of safety, target profit, and CVP charts.
learningObjectives: Calculate break-even point in units and revenue.

simpleExplanation.title: How much must we sell?
simpleExplanation.summary: CVP analysis uses contribution to find break-even — where total contribution equals fixed costs — and how far sales can fall before loss.
steps: Contribution per unit = SP − VC per unit.
BEP (units) = fixed costs ÷ contribution per unit.
Margin of safety = budgeted sales − BEP.
Target profit — add required contribution to fixed costs.

sections.content: **CVP analysis** (2.2.4) completes Paper 2. State **assumptions** when evaluating.
